meaning: adj.那,那个 pron.那,那个 conj.引导从句
examples: I reckon (that) I'm going to get that job.
Phew! That was close—that car nearly hit us.
Look at that moon. Is that beautiful or what?
The First Minister told him that "we need to encourage cultural and behavioural change".
The company will close 53 stores that trade as Threshers, Victoria Wine, Haddows and Bottoms Up.
